title: One shared compaction module: log, counts, sweep, warning, anchor predicate
action: Per D3/D4/D5/D9/D10/D12/D13. Create skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/compaction.mjs as the single domain module both the hooks and the CLI verbs call. Exports: (1) appendCompactionRecord(root, {event, sessionId, ...}) writing .bee/logs/compaction.jsonl with the D5 record shape {ts, event, session, lane, feature, phase, cell, compact_index, cell_compact_count, anchor_present}; the append has a LOCAL try/catch so a write failure never changes any caller's behavior or exit code (precedent: hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs:106-128). ONLY precompact records are counted and only a precompact record counts itself — on precompact both counts are prior-precompact-records + 1; on resume both carry the plain prior count, never +1 again. (2) readCompactionCounts(root, {sessionId, cell}). (3) survivalWarning(count) returning the D9 advisory text when cell_compact_count >= 2, else null. (4) anchorMissing(root, {sessionId}) implementing D10's predicate: resolved phase non-terminal (terminal set is idle | compounding-complete, see state.mjs:1655) AND (a cell claimed by this session OR approved_gates.execution true) AND readIntent returns null; it returns the exact command string to run. (5) compactCheck(root, {sessionId}) implementing the D12 sweep, read-only: session record exists and stored id matches; lane binding resolves via resolvePipeline with the LANE_INVALID/LANE_MISSING/LANE_CORRUPT typed refusals SURFACED not swallowed; every cell claimed by this session still claimed and owned by it; approved_gates.execution still true whenever a cell is claimed; the claimed cell's deps still capped; this session's reservations still held by it, with session-less rows reported as 'unbound' and never counted as a mismatch (reservations.mjs:92-98); an anchor exists. Copy the finished file to .bee/bin/lib/compaction.mjs in this cell (D18) so the test runs against the mirror the rest of the repo uses. Author scripts/test_compaction_module.mjs covering the plan.md test-matrix rows that apply here — in particular two full compaction cycles asserting the D9 threshold fires on the SECOND, not the first, and a read-only .bee/logs/ case asserting the caller's exit code is unchanged.

truths: A resume record never re-increments the counts — one compaction reads as one, not two.
compactCheck mutates nothing: running it twice in a row is byte-identical and leaves every claim, reservation and state file untouched.
A corrupt lane record surfaces its typed LANE_* code rather than falling back silently.
A failed log append leaves the caller's return value and exit code unchanged.
prohibitions: No behavior may live only in a hook — this module is where it lives (D3).
The sweep never repairs, never releases a claim or reservation, never blocks.
Do not add log rotation or a size cap (D4) — no existing .bee/logs/ file has one.

trace.dropped_reason: Slice 1 re-shaped after validation returned NOT READY (6 blocking findings). Superseded by the D19-D22 shape: hook keeps anchor ownership, per-cell manifest+ledger regen, serial chain, split cells.
